title: FAMILY DAY 1 — Backyard picnic
prompt: Wide cinematic shot in @backyard, bright sunny afternoon, lens flare, shallow depth of field. A red-and-white checkered picnic blanket spread on the green grass, a basket of sandwiches, a bowl of strawberries, a thermos. @Mama in the CENTER of the blanket, legs tucked under her, laughing — head thrown back. @Sara on the LEFT holds up half a sandwich triumphantly. @Eva on the RIGHT lies on her back giggling, holding a strawberry up to the sun. Mama (laughing, warm): "This is the best Mother's Day breakfast I've ever had." Sara (giggling): "It's LUNCH, Mama!" Eva (singing-along): "LUNCH-LUNCH-LUNCH!" Cheerful warm folk music.
